description_long: This is a four-story urban cafe building with a flat roof, constructed primarily from light gray brick and accented with white stone trim at the corners and around the windows. The front facade features two large windows above a blue awning that shades the main entrance, flanked by two potted shrubs and a classic streetlamp. The side walls display fire escape staircases, metal ladders, and graffiti art, adding to the building's metropolitan character. The rooftop is equipped with utility boxes, a water tank, and a metal railing, suggesting functional urban infrastructure. The sidewalk around the building is paved with stone, and there are additional streetlamps and planters enhancing the streetscape. The overall design is reminiscent of early 20th-century urban architecture, blending utilitarian and decorative elements.
description: A four-story brick cafe with white stone trim, blue awning, fire escapes, rooftop utilities, and urban graffiti, set on a paved sidewalk with streetlamps and planters.
description_view_0: The left side of the cafe shows a plain brick wall with two tall windows at the top, bordered by white stone trim, and a fire escape ladder visible on the far side.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the main entrance with a blue awning, two potted shrubs, two large windows above, and a streetlamp on the sidewalk.
description_view_2: The right side features fire escape stairs, graffiti art on the lower wall, and rooftop details including utility boxes and a railing.
description_view_3: The rear view displays multiple fire escape platforms and ladders, a small window, and additional graffiti, with rooftop access visible.
